---
title: "Projects"
toc: false
---

<style>
#title-block-header { display: none; }
</style>

<p class="eyebrow">Work</p>

<p class="headline">Disciplined where it counts. Curious everywhere else.</p>

<p class="lede">A few things I've built recently. Unless noted otherwise, the data
engineering, modelling, and analysis are mine end to end.</p>

<div class="project-list">

<div class="project-list-item">
<a class="project-list-thumb-link" href="projects/aemo-exogenous-shock.html">
<img src="images/ols_vs_hybrid_threshold_comparison.png" class="project-list-thumb">
</a>
<div class="project-list-body">
<div class="project-list-tags">
<span class="status-badge status-complete">Complete</span>
<span class="tag-chip">Forecasting (Econometric)</span>
<span class="tag-chip">One-Off</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-list-title"><a href="projects/aemo-exogenous-shock.html">Reacting to an Exogenous Shock Mid-Forecast</a></h3>
<p class="project-list-desc">A demo forecasting model showing how to detect and respond to an exogenous shock partway through a forecast horizon, using AEMO electricity demand data.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-list-item">
<a class="project-list-thumb-link" href="projects/chronicling-america.html">
<img src="images/wedding-placeholder.png" class="project-list-thumb">
</a>
<div class="project-list-body">
<div class="project-list-tags">
<span class="status-badge status-complete">Complete</span>
<span class="tag-chip">ETL Pipelines</span>
<span class="tag-chip">Historical Recipe Series</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-list-title"><a href="projects/chronicling-america.html">Chronicling America API Migration</a></h3>
<p class="project-list-desc">Migrating a bulk newspaper data pipeline to a new API after the legacy access method was deprecated.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-list-item">
<a class="project-list-thumb-link" href="projects/ocr-assistance-model.html">
<img src="images/wedding-placeholder.png" class="project-list-thumb">
</a>
<div class="project-list-body">
<div class="project-list-tags">
<span class="status-badge status-in-progress">In Progress</span>
<span class="tag-chip">Historical Recipe Series</span>
<span class="tag-chip">Python</span>
</div>
<h3 class="project-list-title"><a href="projects/ocr-assistance-model.html">Training an OCR Assistance Model</a></h3>
<p class="project-list-desc">A model-in-progress to assist OCR correction on historical newspaper scans, as part of the Historical Recipe Series.</p>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="section-divider"></div>

## Latest Articles

<p class="headline">A few notes on the work, written as I go.</p>

<div class="article-teasers">
<div class="article-teaser position-relative">
<h3><a class="stretched-link" href="articles/reflections-on-vibe-coding.html">Reflections on Vibe Coding: Get the Craftsman a Duck that Talks Back</a></h3>
<p>What changed when I pointed AI at a from-scratch build versus a legacy API migration - and what the research says about why.</p>
</div>
<div class="article-teaser position-relative">
<h3><a class="stretched-link" href="articles/exogenous-shocks-in-practice.html">Lorem Ipsum Dolor Sit Amet Consectetur</a></h3>
<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore.</p>
</div>
</div>

<p class="view-all-link"><a href="articles.html">View all articles &rarr;</a></p>
